description: A customer calls claiming they were charged twice for a single online order.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the customer's order in the system.

nodes.task_description: Check the payment transaction history for that order.

expected_outcome.value: The agent sees two payment authorization attempts but confirms that only one was actually captured.

nodes.task_description: Explain to the customer that one charge is a temporary authorization that will drop off their statement, and that they were only truly charged once. Offer to send a copy of the payment receipt.

expected_outcome.value: The agent clarifies the situation and resolves the customer's concern.
